meta.title: Bosun - AI Agent Guidelines and Skills for PressGang Themes
meta.description: Bosun composes CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and agent skills for PressGang WordPress themes from the packages and features actually installed.

hero.badge: 🧭 WP-CLI package · composes CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md + skills · registers MCP
hero.title: Your AI crew,
hero.lede: Bosun composes AI agent guidelines and skills for [PressGang](https://pressgang.dev/) themes — generated from what each theme **actually has installed and enabled**, so every agent that comes aboard knows the ropes.

terminal.label: wp-content/themes/harbour-cafe
terminal.code:
$ wp package install pressgang-wp/bosun
$ wp bosun install

✔ Inventory: pressgang 2.1 · quartermaster 1.3
✔ Template routing detected — guidance aboard
✔ Composed CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md
✔ Skills installed → .claude/skills/
✔ MCP server registered → .mcp.json

All hands briefed.

sections.title: Convention is invisible to an unbriefed agent
body: PressGang's best features leave barely a trace in a child theme's code — controllers route by convention, config merges silently, context getters wire themselves. Great for developers who know the ship; invisible to AI agents who don't.
An unbriefed agent writes working code that misses everything the framework gives you: hand-rolled query arrays, stub template files, hooks in `functions.php`. Bosun closes that gap at the source.
sections.code:
# harbour-cafe — agent guidelines

## Template routing is ON
Do not create archive-*.php stubs.
Controllers resolve by convention.

## Queries use Quartermaster 1.3
Prefer fluent methods over raw args.

## Post types live in config/
Never register via add_action('init').

sections.title: Composed from the ship's manifest
sections.intro: Not a static template pasted into every repo — Bosun inspects each theme and writes guidance for what's actually there.

cards.title: 📋 Inventory-driven
cards.body: Detects installed packages, versions, and enabled features — template routing, Quartermaster, WooCommerce — and briefs accordingly.

cards.title: 🧠 Every agent format
cards.body: Writes `CLAUDE.md` and `AGENTS.md`, plus agent skills — one briefing, every AI coding tool aboard.

cards.title: 🔄 Re-run anytime
cards.body: Add a package, enable a feature, re-run `wp bosun install` — the briefing keeps pace with the ship.

cards.title: 🔌 Live tools, not just docs
cards.body: Where [Capstan](/capstan/) can serve MCP, Bosun wires its introspection — routing, config, health, version-aware docs search — straight into your editor's `.mcp.json`, so agents observe the live theme, not just read about it.

ecosystem.title: Built for the PressGang fleet
ecosystem.intro: Bosun completes the loop: [Capstan](/capstan/) launches the project, [PressGang](https://pressgang.dev/) structures it, [Quartermaster](/quartermaster/) queries it — and Bosun makes sure your AI tools know all of it.

footer.title: 🧭 Bosun
footer.summary: AI agent guidelines and skills for PressGang WordPress themes. Open source, MIT licensed. Part of the pressgang-wp fleet.
